---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
#| include: false

source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
```

## Prepare HR data
```{r}
hr_data <- read_all("HR.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Prepare IBI data
```{r}
ibi_data <- read_all("IBI.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Prepare TEMP data
```{r}
temp_data <- read_all("TEMP.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Prepare BVP data
```{r}
bvp_data <- read_all("BVP.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Prepare EDA data
```{r}
eda_data <- read_all("EDA.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```
